text:
(In reply to Michael Osipov from comment #6)
Oh ok, good. Just to ensure we are aligned and seeing the same, I'm referring to this summary: https://imgur.com/TqiOtxP (pointing out as I don't know how that phabricator works).

As for Christer, he has been out in the road traveling. He let me do releases and I'm making them since the previous one, I'm not sure when he will be full online again, I'll discuss that role thing with Barry and him.

Thanks.
